intended_use: The OFIX MIS App software assists healthcare professionals in viewing, storing, and measuring images as well as planning orthopedic surgeries. The app allows service providers to plan surgical procedu
intended_use_full: The OFIX MIS App software assists healthcare professionals in viewing, storing, and measuring images as well as planning orthopedic surgeries. The app allows service providers to plan surgical procedures by including tools for measuring anatomical components for placement of surgical implants. Clinical judgment and experience are required to properly use the software.
target_condition: Orthopedic spinal surgery requiring pedicle screw immobilization and stabilization
other_metrics: The testing demonstrated that the App meets the required specifications and demonstrated accuracy and usability with bench top and simulated use testing.
